- [ ] Bug fix

- [ ] `npm run check` passes

## Scope check

- [ ] This change stays within the contribution boundaries in `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] No live credentials, private paths, or live identifiers introduced
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` if user-facing
